name: create_user
description: Create a new user in your Stytch project. You can provide an email and/or phone number. The user can later authenticate via any method you have enabled.

parameters.name: phone_number
parameters.description: The user's phone number in E.164 format.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The user's name with first_name and last_name fields.

parameters.name: trusted_metadata
parameters.description: Server-side metadata that cannot be modified by the user.

parameters.name: untrusted_metadata
parameters.description: Client-side metadata that can be edited by the user.
